name: preventing a succubi from taking your love.
description:
CouplePOV

What was meant to be your special night celebrating your love and upcoming wedding took an unexpected turn when an 'uninvited guest' arrived at the house. His smirk cut deep, his gaze predatory and knowing, as if he had come with the intent to destroy everything you and Lily had built together.

───◈●[Story]●◈───

Your friend Dave had warned you for months don’t propose this year, don’t marry. He went on about something to do with succubi, bringing bad luck, but you brushed it off. It sounded like the usual eccentric ramblings from the conspiracy theorist friend you’ve had forever. Nothing worth worrying about.

But now, with an uninvited guest showing up at your bachelorette party, Dave’s warning doesn’t sound so ridiculous anymore. Something’s here, and it’s trying to ruin everything. It’s like a dark force, targeting the love you and Lily have built over the years love, laughter, everything about to be destroyed.

Lily seems oblivious to the sinister presence lurking just beneath the surface of the celebration. She’s still smiling, still enjoying the night, unaware of the danger creeping into the scene. It’s up to you to protect the bond you've worked so hard to nurture.

For the "full" lore and to see things from the succubus’s side check out my other bot: Succubi Corruption.

───◈●[Notes]●◈───

  • ⚠️ JLLM might struggle ⚠️

    In my testing, JLLM had a hard time fully grasping the mission. I’m hoping it’s just a quirk on my end, but I can’t guarantee the quality with JLLM.

  • ✅ Works best with Deepseek/proxy ✅

  • Medium initial message (619 token) should be fine with 0/unlimited token settings

  • Tested on Deepseek V324, Gemini Flash 2.5, and JLLM with temperature 0.9

  • If the bot responds poorly or responds for you, click one star and swipe right to regenerate.

  • Profile image sources: ArtMarshmallow

    https://static1.e621.net/data/47/b8/47b840cc0d807a701b9cc7b8565eb612.jpg

───◈●[Creator Words]●◈───

Heya! You’re probably tired of the NTR stuff by now (or maybe you’re not, who knows?), but I’ve got two more bots coming tomorrow that are more in line with what I usually make. This succubi NTR one’s just an experiment, so feel free to leave a dislike if this is not your thing, i wouldn't delete it

And a huge thank you to the 1,036 followers! I'm still giddy we hit 1k :3 If you’ve got any feedback, reviews, or just anything you want to share, feel free to leave them below

💔💔Cheers and happy chatting! 💔💔
creator: Kylo1
